title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates
company: Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates:
Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates!
